changes: Shield Swipe is now an ability and does not trigger global cooldown.
Shield Swipe recast time adjusted to 15 seconds.
Shield Swipe potency reduced from 210 to 150.
Goring Blade TP cost reduced from 60 to 50.
Shield Bash TP cost reduced from 150 to 120.
Ten, Chi, and Jin abilities adjusted to accommodate connection speeds and latencies.
Mutilate TP cost reduced from 80 to 70.
Shadow Fang TP cost reduced from 70 to 60.
Heavy Shot: Timing at which Straight Shot's icon flashes while under the effect of Straighter Shot has been adjusted.
Straight Shot TP cost reduced from 70 to 60.
Royal Road effect is no longer lost when leaving an area.
The casting time of the Adrenaline Rush ability, Terminal Velocity, has been reduced.

new_content.name: Saint Mocianne's Arboretum
new_content.description: New dungeon for level 60 players, requiring average item level 170.

new_content.name: Pharos Sirius (Hard)
new_content.description: New hard mode dungeon for level 60 players, requiring average item level 170.

new_content.name: The Minstrel's Ballad: Thordan's Reign
new_content.description: New trial for level 60 players, requiring average item level 190.

new_content.name: The Void Ark
new_content.description: New 24-player alliance raid dungeon for level 60 players, requiring average item level 175.

new_content.name: The Diadem
new_content.description: New exploration zone for airship exploration, offering gear with random parameters.

new_content.name: Lord of Verminion
new_content.description: New competitive mini-game system located in the Gold Saucer involving minion battles.

new_content.name: Estate Sharing
new_content.description: New housing feature allowing owners to designate up to three friends as tenants with specific authorizations.

new_content.name: Main Scenario Quests (Patch 3.1)
new_content.description: Continuation of the Heavensward storyline starting with 'An Uncertain Future'.

new_content.name: Vanu Vanu Beast Tribe Quests
new_content.description: New beast tribe questline and settlement for the Vanu Vanu.

new_content.name: Idling Camera
new_content.description: New system feature to capture screenshots with a fixed-point camera.

new_content.name: Group Pose
new_content.description: New system feature to synchronize emotes for screenshots.

housing.name: Level 4 Aetherial Wheel Stand
housing.description: A metal stand upon which aetherial wheels are placed and spun to charge. Holds two grade 1, one grade 2, and one grade 3 wheel.

housing.name: Stack of Tomes
housing.description: A neatly assembled collection of works ranging from poetry to history. A tidy bibliophile's dream.

housing.name: Pile of Tomes
housing.description: A slightly strewn collection of works ranging from mythology to philosophy. A tidy bibliophile's nightmare.

housing.name: Mhachi Coffin
housing.description: A faithful replica of a coffin discovered in The Void Ark.

housing.name: Funguar Chair
housing.description: A low stool designed to resemble a mushroom.

housing.name: Mahogany Partition Door
housing.description: A partition and door combination, reaching to the ceiling and so sturdy that it may as well be a wall.

housing.name: The Unending Journey
housing.description: A full record of your past adventures, in one massive volume.

housing.name: Manor Oven
housing.description: A large cooking oven designed in a similar fashion to the unit found in Haukke Manor's kitchens.

housing.name: Manor Counter
housing.description: A large counter designed in a similar fashion to the unit found in Haukke Manor's kitchens.

housing.name: Oriental Round Table
housing.description: A low, circular table used for sitting on the floor.

housing.name: Oriental Tea Set
housing.description: Bring a touch of the exotic to tea time with this collection of authentic Doman ceramic ware.

housing.name: A Knight to Remember
housing.description: A commissioned portrait of recently deceased companion Haurchefaunt Greystone entitled A Knight to Remember.

housing.name: Microscopically Small Mogwall
housing.description: Exterior Wall Decoration: A set of four walls designed for those who wish to transform their estate into home fit for a moogle.

housing.name: Middlingly Medium Mogwall
housing.description: Exterior Wall Decoration: A set of four walls designed for those who wish to transform their estate into home fit for a moogle.

housing.name: Monstrously Large Mogwall
housing.description: Exterior Wall Decoration: A set of four walls designed for those who wish to transform their estate into home fit for a moogle.

housing.name: Cob Inner Wall
housing.description: Interior Wall: A rustic wall made of soil, straw, and lime.

housing.name: Manor Flooring
housing.description: Flooring similar in design to that used in Haukke Manner.

housing.name: Faerie Chandelier
housing.description: Ceiling Light: This delicate light fixture will remind you the wood is alive and always watching...

housing.name: Topiary Chocobo
housing.description: Outdoor Furnishings: A specially bred shrub pruned to the shape of a chipper chocobo.

housing.name: Oriental Grass
housing.description: Outdoor Furnishings: A tall variety of wild grass with stalks that ends in large silver tufts of wispy flowers.

housing.name: Dravanian Down Tree
housing.description: Outdoor Furnishings: A unique species of flora found only growing in the Sea of Clouds.

housing.name: Cold Knight's Cookfire
housing.description: Outdoor Furnishings: A warm fire and a place to rest one's weary legs.

housing.name: Oriental Snowcave
housing.description: Outdoor Furnishings: A tightly packed pile of snow hollwed out and formed into a tiny dwelling.

glamour.name: The Emperor's New Fists
glamour.description: The most beautiful pair of pugilist's arms you will never see.
